decisions.title_en: Alphabet Q2 beats but lifts 2026 capex to $205B, stock drops
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Q2 revenue $119.8B (+24%), Cloud +82%; capex guidance raised from $180-190B to $195-205B, shares fell ~6-7%.

decisions.title_en: White House OSTP accuses Moonshot of distilling Anthropic's Fable to build Kimi K3
decisions.reason: New story_key. OSTP Director Kratsios alleged covert distillation + GB300 access via Thailand; Redwood's Greenblatt published cross-entropy evidence K3 disproportionately IDs as Claude. Distinct from prior moonshot-kimi-k3 release coverage.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI unveils $30B 3.2GW Project Camellia data center in Georgia
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. First self-built OpenAI campus, 3.2GW via Georgia Power 25-yr deal, OpenAI covers all grid infrastructure cost.

decisions.title_en: AMD launches Helios rack-scale AI system + MI400 to challenge Nvidia
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. First AMD rack-scale system, 72 MI455X + EPYC Venice, ~2.9 EF inference, Microsoft as new customer, ships 2H2026.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft replaces OpenAI image models in PowerPoint with own MAI-Image-2.5, ~84% cheaper
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. MAI-Image-2.5 now in production in PowerPoint, cutting GPU cost up to ~84% vs GPT-Image-2; marks Microsoft reducing OpenAI dependency.

decisions.title_en: China's PsiBot hits $1.48B valuation, Chery-led round for world models
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Raising ~$100M at $1.48B, led by carmaker Chery, world-model embodied AI startup.

decisions.title_en: European industrial humanoid startup Humanoid raises EUR133M at EUR1.1B
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. EUR133M ($152M) Series A at EUR1.1B valuation, partners SAP/NVIDIA/Bosch/Siemens.

decisions.title_en: Black Forest Labs launches FLUX 3 + FLUX-mimic video-action robotics model
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. FLUX 3 multimodal (image/video/audio/action); FLUX-mimic fine-tunes robot tasks in 30 min vs 30+ hrs, tested at Audi.

decisions.title_en: Alphabet's Anthropic stake worth ~$124.3B per filing
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Alphabet 10-Q disclosed its Anthropic stake at ~$124.3B of unrealized private-company gains as of June 30 - striking implied Anthropic value.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches Presence enterprise agent platform
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-22 with title about Presence handling 75% of OpenAI's own calls. No substantively new info today.

decisions.title_en: Elon Musk warns on AI risk, endorses Hassabis FINRA-style body
decisions.reason: Convergence on frontier regulation already published 2026-07-16 (ai-labs-regulation-convergence), including Musk/Altman praise for Hassabis proposal. Musk restating support adds no substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA + Microsoft RTX Spark AI PCs
decisions.reason: Announced at Computex on 2026-06-01; Jensen's July 22 visit was a commissioning event, not new news. event_date 2026-06-01 is >5 days old.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic expected to launch Claude Opus 5 on July 23
decisions.reason: Non-event: Polymarket surged to 88% but as of 2026-07-23 Anthropic did NOT announce Opus 5; newest remains Opus 4.8. No confirmed development to report.

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek retires legacy model names July 24
decisions.reason: Routine API migration deadline (deepseek-chat/reasoner retired), not a new model or significant development. Below significance bar.
